name: root
description: TypeScript base PDF generator and React base UI. Open source, developed by the community, and completely free to use under the MIT license!
author: hand-dot

scripts.build: vp run -w clean && vp run -w build:pdf-lib && vp run -w build:common && vp run -w build:converter && vp run -w build:schemas && run-p build:generator build:ui build:manipulator
scripts.check: npm run fmt:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && vp run --filter '@pdfme/*' test && npm run test --prefix playground
scripts.fmt: vp run --filter '@pdfme/*' fmt && npm run fmt:playground && npm run fmt:meta
scripts.fmt:check: vp fmt -c .oxfmtrc.json packages/common/src packages/converter/src packages/generator/src packages/manipulator/src packages/pdf-lib/src packages/schemas/src packages/ui/src playground/src playground/e2e playground/vite.config.ts playground/vitest.setup.ts playground/postcss.config.js playground/tailwind.config.js package.json packages/common/package.json packages/converter/package.json packages/generator/package.json packages/manipulator/package.json packages/pdf-lib/package.json packages/schemas/package.json packages/ui/package.json playground/package.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json playground/.oxlintrc.json vite.config.mts --check
scripts.fmt:meta: vp fmt -c .oxfmtrc.json package.json packages/common/package.json packages/converter/package.json packages/generator/package.json packages/manipulator/package.json packages/pdf-lib/package.json packages/schemas/package.json packages/ui/package.json playground/package.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json playground/.oxlintrc.json vite.config.mts --write
scripts.ci: vp run check && vp run build && vp run build:playground && vp run test:playground
scripts.lint: vp run --filter '@pdfme/*' lint && npm run lint --prefix playground
scripts.lint:fix: vp lint -c .oxlintrc.json packages/common/src packages/converter/src packages/generator/src packages/manipulator/src packages/pdf-lib/src packages/schemas/src packages/ui/src --fix && npm run lint --prefix playground -- --fix
scripts.lint:oxlint: vp lint -c .oxlintrc.json packages/common/src packages/converter/src packages/generator/src packages/manipulator/src packages/pdf-lib/src packages/schemas/src packages/ui/src
